## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content production progress, analytics, and next steps for Hotel Engine's blog strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 16 approved topics and 18 in production](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Joel will be the new point person for content review, replacing James](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Analytics discussion focused on conversion tracking and isolating GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Hotel Engine's custom sentiment analysis tool could provide valuable insights for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [16 approved topics ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [18 topics in production](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Over 30 articles available, providing 6 weeks of content buffer](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [12 articles ready for Joel's review](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Publishing goal: average of 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Joel working on Amplitude dashboard for blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Key metrics: blog visits, sign-up clicks, form submissions](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Discussing appropriate conversion funnel timeframe (1 day vs. 7 days)](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Exploring ways to isolate GrowthX-created content for accurate tracking](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Considering unique CTA links for GrowthX content to track conversions](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### Custom Sentiment Analysis Tool

  - [Hotel Engine developed a tonality and sentiment analyzer](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Tool trained on customer language from call transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Potential to use for refining content prompts and improving pre-edit output](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [James offered to run queries through the tool to provide insights](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

### Content Categorization and LLMs.txt

  - [Wedding-based content deprioritized until proper categorization is determined](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Dave (GrowthX) working on LLMs.txt implementation using top 25-30 traffic posts](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

### Review Process and Publishing Cadence

  - [Joel to set a regular day for content review](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Carrie will manage the publishing schedule and remind Joel as needed](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Flexibility in publishing schedule (e.g., 5 per week on average, but can vary)](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to review 12 ready articles and set a regular review day](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Joel to create Amplitude dashboard and share with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [James to provide custom GPT prompt based on customer language](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Carrie to deprioritize wedding-based content until categorization is determined](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Dave to complete LLMs.txt implementation](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring content performance and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
